detail.pointsTooltip: The variants in this group total {{ total }} pts, but only {{ cap }} pts count toward your course score.

callout.heading: Choose a variant to work on
callout.body: This group has {{ count }} variants. You can work on any or all of them.
callout.cappedScore: Your combined score for this group is capped at {{ maxPoints }} points.

timelineLocked.tooltip: These dates are managed by the exercise group. Click to edit the group's timeline.

deleteDialog.question: Are you sure you want to delete the group {{ title }}? The exercises in this group will not be deleted, only ungrouped.
deleteDialog.typeNameToConfirm: Please type in the name of the group to confirm.
